moduleTitle: Elements of Lighting, Contrast, and Resolution

lessons.title: Fundamentals of Light and Light Sources
objectives: Explain the fundamentals of light relevant to visual inspection
Compare incandescent and luminescent light sources including fluorescent, high-intensity discharge, LEDs, and lasers
Select an appropriate light source for a given inspection task
cp105Topics: 3.2.2 Luminescent radiators (fluorescent light, high-intensity discharge light, light-emitting diodes, lasers)

lessons.title: Adequate Light Levels, Glare, and General Lighting Requirements
objectives: State adequate light level requirements for visual testing and how to verify them
Explain how glare contributes to inspector fatigue and missed indications
Apply general lighting requirements to an inspection setup

lessons.title: Contrast and Resolution
objectives: Explain reflection at smooth and rough/textured surfaces and the law of illumination
Relate reflectivity, luminance, and luminous contrast to indication visibility
Describe how cleanliness, dark-field techniques, color, and surface geometry contribute to contrast
cp105Topics: 4.1 Reflection at smooth and rough/textured surfaces
4.7 Colors and contribution of colors to contrast
